title: URAQT Microfibre Car Drying Towel, 90x60cm Large XXL Microfibre Car Cloth 600GSM, Premium Drying Towel Large Towels, for Household Washing, Detailing, Motorcycles Polishing, Vehicles Washing
features: 🚗【High Quality Microfiber Material】URAQT microfiber cloth is made of high quality extra thick coral fleece material, which is very soft, breathable, thick, durable, lint-free, moth-proof, mildew-proof, tear-resistant, odorless, clean without streaks.

🚙【Excellent Water Absorption & Reusable】The water absorption capacity of the cloth can reach 7 times its own weight. The water absorption rate is more than 4 times that of ordinary towels. It dries very quickly, making it difficult for bacteria to multiply. These car are durable and can be washed and reused thousands of times without worrying about shrinking, falling off or losing their cleaning power! Can be washed by hand or machine.

🚗【Safe, borderless design】Microfiber car are specially developed for car care. With a non-abrasive design, it will not scratch the surface, stainless steel or glass. Worry-free vehicle drying. Leave no traces, clean as new.

🏠【Economical and practical】The 600gsm microfiber car cloth has excellent water absorption and can quickly absorb moisture from the exterior of the vehicle without water stains or streaks. These towels can be washed and reused hundreds of times without worrying about shrinking or double-sided shedding.

🚗【Multiple Uses】Whether you're cleaning your kitchen and bathroom indoors or cleaning and beautifying your car outdoors, this sturdy cloth can handle the toughest grease, dirt, dust, and spills! It can be widely used in kitchens, homes, cars, hotels, restaurants, commercial, industrial and other places.
